af_score_components.notes: Weaviate open-source vector database. No MCP server. GraphQL for queries + REST for CRUD + gRPC for high-performance (agents need to handle two/three interfaces). OpenAPI/Swagger spec available. WCS sandboxes expire after 14 days. Built-in vectorizer modules require API keys at startup. gRPC recommended but requires v4 Python client. auth_complexity=75 for API key with OIDC option.

security_score_components.security_notes: All HTTPS enforced on WCS. API key and OIDC/OAuth2 auth for enterprise. RBAC available on Weaviate Cloud. Self-hosted can run without auth (dev mode only). SOC2/GDPR/ISO27001 certified on WCS. Module API keys set at server startup as env vars. Strong security posture for enterprise vector database use.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: WCS has status page and SLA. SOC2/ISO27001 certified. Full idempotency for vector operations. Cursor pagination. Retry guidance documented. WCS sandboxes expire (14 days) — production clusters are persistent. gRPC v4 client for high-performance. Cross-references require separate calls. Strong overall reliability for vector database workloads.

af_score_components.notes: Web Agent Protocol records browser interactions and generates MCP servers from them. Has MCP quality 58. OpenAI/DeepSeek API key for smart replay. Python 3.11 + Conda required (no pip-only install). Collection server must run on localhost:4934 during recording. Recordings break when DOM changes. Requires explicit Chrome extension task-start/finish events. auth_complexity=85 for env-var LLM API key.

security_score_components.security_notes: LLM API keys via environment variables. Chrome extension records browser sessions (potential privacy concern — recorded interactions may contain sensitive data). Local collection server on localhost:4934. No compliance certifications. Community project with limited security review. Browser automation has inherent security considerations.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Reliability depends on DOM stability of target sites. Replay breaks when DOM changes. Python 3.11 + Conda dependency adds fragility. Chrome extension dependency. No SLA. Early-stage community project. Smart replay via LLM adds non-determinism. Suitable for stable, repeatable workflows on known-static sites.

af_score_components.notes: IMPORTANT: Web Eval Agent is SUNSETTED and no longer maintained. Has MCP quality 55. Required API key from operative.sh which may not be available post-sunset. Playwright must be installed separately. DO NOT start new integrations with this tool. auth_complexity=80 for API key that may no longer be available.

security_score_components.security_notes: SUNSETTED PROJECT: Security is no longer maintained. API key from operative.sh with uncertain availability. Browser automation security concerns. No compliance. Dependency hygiene unknown as unmaintained. Existing security 50.0 reflects limited initial security investment. Strongly advise against using sunsetted tool.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: SUNSETTED: No reliability guarantees. API key source (operative.sh) uncertain post-sunset. BrowserUse framework evolves rapidly causing breakage. Playwright must be managed separately. Team building something new at withrefresh.com. No SLA, no maintenance, no bug fixes. Do not use for any new projects.

af_score_components.notes: Cisco Webex enterprise collaboration API. No MCP server. Bot tokens for agents (simpler than OAuth2, long-lived). Room IDs are base64-encoded and non-human-readable. Webhook validation via X-Spark-Signature. Adaptive Cards less mature than Teams. Message markdown limited vs Slack Block Kit. auth_complexity=75 for bot token simplicity for agents.

security_score_components.security_notes: All HTTPS enforced. OAuth2 with granular scopes for user integrations. Bot tokens for automated agents — long-lived but scoped. SOC2/ISO27001/HIPAA/FedRAMP certified — exceptionally strong compliance posture for government and healthcare. Webhook signature verification (X-Spark-Signature). Cisco enterprise security standards throughout.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Cisco provides enterprise SLA and status page. FedRAMP authorization indicates rigorous availability requirements. Cursor pagination. API versioned with deprecation notices. No idempotency support. Bot tokens are long-lived (reliable for automation). Webhook delivery with X-Spark-Signature for security. Strong enterprise reliability.

af_score_components.notes: Webflow CMS and site management API. No MCP server. OAuth2 recommended for multi-site, API tokens for personal. v2 API (2023+) has breaking changes from v1. CMS staging/live duality requires separate publish call. Rate limit 60 req/min (strict for bulk). Multi-reference fields require verbose API calls. auth_complexity=80 for bearer token with OAuth2 option.

security_score_components.security_notes: All HTTPS enforced. OAuth2 with scoped access (CMS, Forms, Sites, e-commerce). API tokens via Authorization header. GDPR/SOC2 compliant. Webhook signature verification available. Collection IDs are site-specific — reduces cross-site data leakage risk. v2 API improvements include better auth model.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Webflow has status page. SOC2 certified. v1 to v2 breaking changes required migration (deprecation policy). Cursor pagination. 60 req/min rate limit requires batching for bulk operations. Staging/live duality means publish is separate step. OpenAPI reference available. Partial idempotency.

af_score_components.notes: Wenyan MCP server for WeChat Official Account publishing. Has MCP quality 72. Requires WECHAT_APP_ID and WECHAT_APP_SECRET. Server IP must be whitelisted in WeChat backend (silently fails without this). Articles require FrontMatter with title. Docker stdio mode requires volume mounting for local images. WeChat account verification takes days. auth_complexity=75 for env-var WeChat credentials.

security_score_components.security_notes: WeChat APP_ID and APP_SECRET via env vars (reasonable). SSE mode supports optional HTTP_API_KEY for request auth. Multi-tenant SSE passes credentials per request. WeChat API uses HTTPS. IP whitelisting adds security layer. No compliance certifications beyond WeChat ToS. Community project with limited security review.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Reliability depends on WeChat Official Account API and server IP whitelisting. Silent failures for missing IP whitelist make debugging hard. WeChat API can have geographic reliability variations. Docker deployment provides operational consistency. No SLA. FrontMatter requirements add article format constraints. Active development.

af_score_components.notes: Wiz cloud security platform. No MCP server. GraphQL API only (no REST). OAuth2 client credentials flow with service accounts. Token endpoint URL varies by tenant region. Webhook payloads contain minimal data (follow-up API call needed). Graph-based data model requires understanding entity relationships. auth_complexity=60 for OAuth2 client credentials with tenant-specific endpoint.

security_score_components.security_notes: All HTTPS enforced. OAuth2 client credentials with scoped service accounts — appropriate for automated security workflows. SOC2/ISO27001/FedRAMP certified — gold standard compliance for security platform. Service accounts with minimal required permissions. Tenant isolation by region. Security company practices exemplary security in its own platform.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: SOC2/FedRAMP certified platform with enterprise SLA. Cursor pagination for large finding sets. Full idempotency for queries. GraphQL-only API requires schema understanding. Tenant-specific OAuth token endpoint requires per-deployment configuration. Webhook delivery is minimal (follow-up required). Enterprise reliability for security platform workloads.

af_score_components.notes: WooCommerce REST API for WordPress ecommerce. No MCP server. Consumer key + consumer secret via Basic Auth over HTTPS (or OAuth 1.0a for HTTP — complex to implement). API performance depends on hosting quality. No built-in rate limiting — agents can overload poorly resourced servers. No idempotency — duplicate calls create duplicate orders. auth_complexity=65 for consumer key/secret model.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS required for Basic Auth (keys transmitted as base64). OAuth 1.0a for HTTP (complex, signature-based). GDPR compliant. Consumer keys generated in WordPress admin. Plugin ecosystem can introduce vulnerabilities. No fine-grained scoping beyond read/write split. WordPress security is operator responsibility. Hosting quality significantly affects security posture.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Reliability entirely dependent on WordPress hosting quality. Shared hosting causes timeouts for agents. No built-in rate limiting risks server overload. WordPress plugin conflicts can break REST API. No idempotency — duplicate requests create duplicates. Offset pagination. No SLA (self-hosted). Suitable for stores on adequate hosting with proper server resources.

af_score_components.notes: WorkOS enterprise authentication platform (SSO/SCIM). No MCP server. Simple API key auth — very agent-friendly. Excellent documentation. SAML assertions are single-use and time-bounded. Directory sync events must be consumed in order. Admin Portal links expire quickly. Webhook events for directory changes can arrive out of order. auth_complexity=100 for simple API key.

security_score_components.security_notes: All HTTPS enforced. Simple API key for backend operations (stored server-side only). SOC2/GDPR/ISO27001 certified — security company with strong posture. SAML assertions single-use prevents replay attacks. Webhook signature verification for event delivery. Enterprise security infrastructure purpose-built for authentication. No credentials in URLs.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: SOC2/ISO27001 certified with status page. Enterprise SLA. Cursor pagination. Retry guidance documented. Directory sync out-of-order events during bulk provisioning. Admin Portal links expire (time-bounded). SAML timing constraints require agent attention. Multi-language SDK maintained. Strong reliability for enterprise auth infrastructure.

af_score_components.notes: Wren Engine semantic layer for AI agent data access. Has MCP quality 75. RBAC with role-based permissions. Beta status with biweekly releases (breaking changes possible). Semantic model must be defined upfront for accurate queries. Supports 15+ data sources. Documentation on RBAC configuration not fully detailed. auth_complexity=70 for RBAC configuration requirement.

security_score_components.security_notes: RBAC enforced at semantic layer — prevents AI agents from accessing data beyond their role permissions. HTTPS for API calls. Data governance is the core value proposition. Beta status means security hardening may be incomplete. No compliance certifications yet. Self-hosted option gives data sovereignty. Rust + Python implementation.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Beta status with biweekly releases — breaking changes expected. Self-hosted so reliability is operator-managed. Semantic model must be maintained for query accuracy. 15+ data source connectors vary in maturity. No SLA as beta. Docker and Kubernetes deployment supported. Active development from Canner team. Production readiness not yet established.
